symptoms.symptom_name: Crushing retrosternal chest pain at rest

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Crushing rest pain is a cardinal ischaemic symptom.
Retrosternal location overlaps with reflux but the quality and rest onset are atypical for it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Radiation of pain to the left arm and jaw

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Radiation to the right arm/shoulder or both arms, and to the jaw, substantially increases the likelihood of acute MI.
Arm/jaw radiation is not a feature of chest-wall musculoskeletal pain.
Diaphoresis accompanying chest pain is a strong discriminator for acute MI.
Resting dyspnoea suggests ischaemic left-ventricular impairment.
Dyspnoea is also prominent in PE, which must be kept on the differential.
A sense of doom is a recognised autonomic accompaniment of a major cardiac event.
Nausea is a non-specific autonomic feature that adds weight in the presence of the wider constellation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pain not reproducible by palpation and unchanged by posture/movement

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Non-reproducible, posture-independent pain argues strongly against a musculoskeletal cause.
By exclusion of a mechanical cause, an ischaemic cause becomes more probable.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fourth heart sound (S4) gallop on auscultation; clear lung fields

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An S4 reflects a stiff, ischaemic left ventricle; clear lungs argue against overt pulmonary oedema. Sealed clinician auscultation — not obtainable via telehealth.

investigation_details.expected_result: Elevated / rising above the 99th-percentile reference limit
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Myocardial infarction cannot be confirmed or typed; requires hospital pathology.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A rising troponin with the clinical picture confirms myocardial infarction. Sealed — a hospital investigation never available in real time via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dynamic ST-segment changes on serial ECG

investigation_details.expected_result: ST-segment elevation or depression / dynamic ischaemic changes
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: STEMI vs NSTEMI cannot be distinguished and reperfusion decisions cannot be made.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: ST elevation defines STEMI and mandates emergency reperfusion. Sealed — requires equipment the patient does not operate.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Crushing radiating rest pain with diaphoresis and resting dyspnoea is the textbook cluster for myocardial ischaemia and warrants immediate emergency escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: First-line for suspected ACS; must be done by paramedics/ED within minutes — the AI Doctor should trigger this by calling 000, not attempt it remotely.
Confirms and types myocardial infarction; hospital pathology only.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home/consumer single-lead ECG or waiting for a home reading before acting
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The AI Doctor must NOT delay 000 to obtain a consumer-device reading; a normal single-lead trace does not exclude ACS and any delay risks myocardial loss.
